subcodes.first_line: O Rasul! The people have awaited the Day of God; know thou that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رسول قوم منتظر یوم الهی بوده بشانیکه
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
